test-case.name: Aggregate_AllSourcesInvalid_WarnsOnceAndOutputsZero
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: no valid input source (all sources reported IsValid=false or no source registered). Output will be zero. This warning is emitted only once per layer per session.

test-case.name: Aggregate_EmptyLayerCoexistsWithValidLayer_OnlyEmptyLayerWarns
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 1: no valid input source (all sources reported IsValid=false or no source registered). Output will be zero. This warning is emitted only once per layer per session.

test-case.name: Aggregate_LayerRecoversAfterBeingEmpty_DoesNotWarnAgain
test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: no valid input source (all sources reported IsValid=false or no source registered). Output will be zero. This warning is emitted only once per layer per session.

test-case.output: [LayerInputSourceAggregator] layer 0: no valid input source (all sources reported IsValid=false or no source registered). Output will be zero. This warning is emitted only once per layer per session.
